title: Senior Software Engineer - Infosys - Multiple Openings

jsonLd.title: Senior Software Engineer - Infosys - Multiple Openings
jsonLd.description:
Infosys has an exciting opening for a Senior Software Engineer at our Thane office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About Infosys:
Infosys is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Implement new features based on product requirements
• Mentor junior developers and conduct knowledge-sharing sessions
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Ensure code security and follow best practices for data protection
• Work with agile methodologies including daily stand-ups and sprint planning
• Integrate third-party APIs and services
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Com / M.Com / MBA Finance
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in JavaScript
• Proficiency in Kubernetes
• Proficiency in Go
• Proficiency in TensorFlow
• Proficiency in AWS
• Proficiency in Node.js
• Proficiency in Python
• Proficiency in Git

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Flexible working hours
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Professional development and training programs
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Referral bonus program
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Thane, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Infosys!
